query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.department, p.research_field, 
  r.image_url as research_image
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN research_field_images r ON p.research_field = r.field_name
WHERE p.name = 'Stephen Gardiner'
LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.department, p.research_field, 
  r.image_url as research_image
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN research_field_images r ON p.research_field = r.field_name

LIMIT 1;
